title: Banks in Asia brace for complex cyber threats from frontier AI
description: Banks across Asia, including those in Singapore - among the region's largest - are tightening checks on artificial intelligence tools as the very newest ​models have raised fears that hackers could find weak spots faster and launch ‌wider cyberattacks.

title: The Motley Fool: Consider Broadcom
description: Semiconductor chips are big business, present even in today's refrigerators and automobiles. And as artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure spending continues to grow, Broadcom (Nasdaq: AVGO) benefits from selling high-performance networking and customized AI chips for data centers.

title: UAE to screen work permit applicants using AI, robotics from May
description: The UAE is launching an artificial intelligence and robotics system to screen work permit applicants starting in May. This initiative aims to improve labor market efficiency and attract skilled professionals. The system will evaluate candidates based on skills, education, experience, and knowledge.

title: Elon Musk to return to witness stand for cross-examination by OpenAI's lawyer
description: OAKLAND, ⁠California, April 30 (Reuters) - Elon Musk is due to return to the witness stand on ⁠Thursday for a second day of cross-examination by Sam Altman's lawyer, in a high-stakes ‌trial over a lawsuit Musk brought accusing OpenAI of abandoning its mission to develop artificial intelligence for the benefit of humanity.

title: Oil prices whipsaw while US stocks hover above their record heights
description: Alphabet led the way and climbed 7.5% after the owner of Google and YouTube reported profit for the latest quarter that almost doubled analysts’ expectations. Investments in artificial intelligence “are lighting up every part of the business,” CEO Sundar Pichai said.

title: Samsung Electronics Q1 net surges over fivefold on AI
description: Samsung Electronics Co. said Thursday its first-quarter net profit surged more than fivefold from a year earlier, driven by robust demand for high-end memory chips used in artificial intelligence (AI) applications.

title: SCG, Huawei and Conch sign MoU on industrial AI
description: Huawei Technologies (Thailand) Co, Ltd announces a landmark tripartite collaboration with The Siam Cement Public Company Limited (SCG) , a leading integrated cement and building materials company in Asean, and Anhui Conch Information Technology Engineering Co, Ltd (Conch) , a specialist in Advanced Process Control (APC) systems and AI-driven industrial optimisation, to jointly develop and deploy an integrated APC and Artificial Intelligence solution underpinned by modern ICT infrastructure, tailored to SCG's cement manufacturing operations.

title: Italy closes antitrust probes into AI firms after commitments on 'hallucination' risks
description: Italy's antitrust authority said on Thursday it had closed investigations into ​three AI companies over allegedly unfair ‌commercial practices involving generative artificial intelligence, after accepting binding commitments from them.
